evals.prompt: Show me how to set up the Directus SDK with TypeScript types and do basic CRUD
expectations: Uses createDirectus with composable pattern (rest, staticToken)
Shows readItems with fields and filter

evals.prompt: How do I subscribe to real-time changes on a collection with the Directus SDK?
evals.expected_output: realtime() composable, connect(), subscribe(), for-await loop
expectations: Uses realtime() composable in client setup
Uses client.subscribe() with collection name and event type
Shows for-await-of loop for consuming events
